title: Operate a robotic sample preparation system
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Operate a robotic sample preparation system demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Prepare robotic system for operation

pcs.text: Perform routine system checks at start of shift
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform routine system checks at start of shift?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform routine system checks at start of shift.

pcs.text: Confirm shift priorities with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm shift priorities with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm shift priorities with supervisor.

pcs.text: Review job requests to identify the samples, required parameters and special instructions/preparation methods for each
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review job requests to identify the samples, required parameters and special instructions/preparation methods for each?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review job requests to identify the samples, required parameters and special instructions/preparation methods for each.

pcs.text: Identify hazards, safety equipment and safe work procedures associated with samples, preparation methods and robotic system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards, safety equipment and safe work procedures associated with samples, preparation methods and robotic system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards, safety equipment and safe work procedures associated with samples, preparation methods and robotic system.

pcs.text: Check that samples are dry and free of obvious contamination
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check that samples are dry and free of obvious contamination?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check that samples are dry and free of obvious contamination.

pcs.text: Check that the particle size of any sample does not exceed system input size limits
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check that the particle size of any sample does not exceed system input size limits?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check that the particle size of any sample does not exceed system input size limits.

pcs.text: Check samples against accompanying documentation and record/report any discrepancies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check samples against accompanying documentation and record/report any discrepancies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check samples against accompanying documentation and record/report any discrepancies.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare robotic system for operation

elements.title: Load samples into system

pcs.text: Scan sample barcodes into system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Scan sample barcodes into system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Scan sample barcodes into system.

pcs.text: Load samples in the correct sequence when the system is ready
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Load samples in the correct sequence when the system is ready?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Load samples in the correct sequence when the system is ready.

pcs.text: Use system monitor to ensure that correct worksheet is assigned to each sample
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use system monitor to ensure that correct worksheet is assigned to each sample?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use system monitor to ensure that correct worksheet is assigned to each sample.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Load samples into system

elements.title: Monitor system and report errors

pcs.text: Monitor screen displays and conduct visual checks, as necessary, to ensure that system operates correctly throughout cycle
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor screen displays and conduct visual checks, as necessary, to ensure that system operates correctly throughout cycle?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor screen displays and conduct visual checks, as necessary, to ensure that system operates correctly throughout cycle.

pcs.text: Recognise common error codes and promptly inform supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise common error codes and promptly inform supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise common error codes and promptly inform supervisor.

pcs.text: Seek advice to deal with any situation beyond scope of responsibility or knowledge
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek advice to deal with any situation beyond scope of responsibility or knowledge?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek advice to deal with any situation beyond scope of responsibility or knowledge.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Monitor system and report errors

elements.title: Unload samples

pcs.text: Unload samples sequentially in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Unload samples sequentially in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Unload samples sequentially in accordance with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Obtain analytical portions of each sample using workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain analytical portions of each sample using workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain analytical portions of each sample using workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Label and store analytical portions and excess sample material in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Label and store analytical portions and excess sample material in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Label and store analytical portions and excess sample material in accordance with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Seek advice when problems are beyond scope of responsibility or knowledge
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek advice when problems are beyond scope of responsibility or knowledge?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek advice when problems are beyond scope of responsibility or knowledge.

pcs.text: Segregate and dispose of wastes in accordance with workplace requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Segregate and dispose of wastes in accordance with workplace requirements.
